title: Onboarding - Organized, Up-to-Date, Personal screens - App in the background
scenario: Onboarding screen animations freeze or screen resets after app is backgrounded for 1-2 minutes and reopened
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Navigate to the onboarding screens (Organized, Up-to-Date, Personal).
3. Observe the current onboarding screen and verify the animation is playing.
4. Send the app to the background (e.g., press the Home button or switch to another app).
6. Reopen the Poly Studio Mobile app by tapping its icon or switching back to it.
8. Check if the animation on the onboarding screen is still functioning.
expected: The app returns to the same onboarding screen (Organized, Up-to-Date, or Personal) that was displayed before being backgrounded, and the animation on that screen continues to function properly without freezing or restarting.
